2606.31200.title: Agentic RAG-VLM: Affordance-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Self-Reflective Planning for Robotic Grasping
2606.31200.paper_summary: Generalizable robotic grasping in cluttered environments is essential for deploying manipulators in unstructured human spaces, yet existing VLM-based methods rely on visual similarity for object matching, neglecting physical affordances such as handle graspability and material fragility, and operate open-loop without spatial reasoning or failure recovery, limiting their effectiveness when objects are densely packed or physically diverse. We present Agentic RAG-VLM, a unified framework that bridges VLM-based semantic understanding and physically grounded grasp execution by integrating retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) with vision-language models (VLMs) and agentic self-reflective planning. Agentic RAG-VLM introduces three tightly coupled components: (1) a Hierarchical Affordance-Aware RAG (HAA-RAG) that encodes four-dimensional affordance descriptors, including type, material, fragility, and graspable region, and retrieves strategies by functional affordance compatibility rather than visual appearance; (2) a Scene Graph Constraint Reasoner that constructs spatial relationship graphs from VLM perception and translates proximity, occlusion, and support constraints into concrete grasp parameter adjustments; and (3) an Agentic Self-Reflective Pipeline with a 14-type failure taxonomy and three-level adaptive retry for closed-loop grasp refinement. Evaluated on a 12-task benchmark spanning single-grasp, interactive, and long-horizon scenarios with 360 trials per configuration, Agentic RAG-VLM achieves 78.3 percent overall success, a 53.3 percentage-point absolute gain over VLM-only baselines, demonstrating that affordance-aware retrieval, scene graph reasoning, and agentic recovery are jointly essential for robust manipulation.
2606.31200.paper_summary_zh: 在雜亂環境中可普遍應用的機器人抓取對於在非結構化的人類空間中部署操作器至關重要，然而現有的基於VLM的方法依賴於物體匹配的視覺相似性，忽略了物理可供性，例如手柄的可抓取性和材料的脆弱性，並且在沒有空間推理或故障恢復的情況下運行開環，這限制了它們在物體密集堆放或物理多樣性情況下的有效性。我們提出了Agentic RAG-VLM，這是一個統一框架，通過將檢索增強生成（RAG）與視覺-語言模型（VLM）和主動自我反思規劃相結合，架起了基於VLM的語義理解和物理基礎抓取執行之間的橋樑。Agentic RAG-VLM引入了三個緊密耦合的組件：（1）一個層次化的可供性感知RAG（HAA-RAG），它編碼四維可供性描述符，包括類型、材料、脆弱性和可抓取區域，並通過功能可供性兼容性而非視覺外觀來檢索策略；（2）一個場景圖約束推理器，從VLM感知構建空間關係圖，並將接近度、遮擋和支持約束轉換為具體的抓取參數調整；以及（3）一個具有14類故障分類法和三級自適應重試的主動自我反思管道，用於閉環抓取精煉。在一個涵蓋單次抓取、互動和長期情境的12項基準測試中，每個配置進行360次試驗，Agentic RAG-VLM實現了78.3%的整體成功率，較僅使用VLM的基準提高了53.3個百分點，證明了可供性感知檢索、場景圖推理和主動恢復對於穩健操作的重要性。
2606.31200.author: Tao Chen et.al.
2606.31200.authors: Tao Chen, Lizheng Liu, Jiaxu Wang, Ziyue Jiang, Ruiqi Tian, JiGuang Huo, Zhongxue Gan
